sql_overrides.sql_query:
SELECT 
EXPENDITURE_ITEM_ID,               
LINE_NUM      ,                    
CREATION_DATE,
CREATED_BY     ,                   
TRANSFER_STATUS_CODE,                         
QUANTITY            ,                           
BILLABLE_FLAG       ,                         
PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE,
PA_DATE ,
COST_CODE_COMBINATION_ID   ,       
GL_DATE,
RECVR_GL_DATE,
REVERSED_FLAG     ,                           
ORG_ID        ,                        
PROJECT_ID    ,                    
TASK_ID     ,                                   
DENOM_CURRENCY_CODE ,                           
DENOM_RAW_COST      ,                           
DENOM_BURDENED_COST   ,                         
PROJECT_CURRENCY_CODE ,       
PROJECT_REV_RATE_date ,                           
PROJECT_REV_RATE_TYPE    ,                
PROJECT_EXCHANGE_RATE   ,                       
PROJFUNC_EXCHANGE_RATE  ,                       
WORK_TYPE_ID        ,                           
RECVR_GL_PERIOD_NAME  ,                 
RECVR_PA_PERIOD_NAME   ,                
PROJFUNC_COST_RATE_TYPE  ,                
PROJFUNC_COST_RATE_date ,            
PROJFUNC_CURRENCY_CODE  ,                 
EXPENDITURE_ITEM_date  ,                   
EXPENDITURE_TYPE       ,                      
EXPENDITURE_ORG_ID    ,                         
  null as job_id ,
SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION ,                     
INVENTORY_ITEM_ID       ,                       
UNIT_OF_MEASURE        ,                      
INCURRED_BY_PERSON_ID   ,                     
INCURRED_BY_ORG_ID      ,                       
ENTERED_BY_PERSON_ID,                           
VENDOR_ID         ,                             
PA_PERIOD_SET_NAME ,              
GL_PERIOD_SET_NAME ,              
PROJECT_ROLE_ID    ,                            
RESOURCE_ORG_ID    ,                            
NON_LABOR_RESOURCE  ,                           
RESOURCE_CLASS      ,                           
WIP_RESOURCE_ID     ,                           
LINE_TYPE           ,                         
PROJFUNC_RAW_COST       ,                       
PROJFUNC_BURDENED_COST  ,                       
PROJECT_RAW_COST        ,                       
PROJECT_BURDENED_COST   ,                       
RAW_COST_RATE          ,                        
BURDEN_COST_RATE       ,                        
BILL_JOB_ID            ,                        
TRANSACTION_SOURCE      ,                     
PROJECT_TYPE_CLASS_CODE  ,                
X_CUSTOM                 ,                    
ATTRIBUTE8               ,                      
  denom_raw_cost ,
COST_BURDEN_DISTRIBUTED_FLAG  ,               
BILL_HOLD_FLAG       ,                        
BURDEN_COST             ,                       
COST_DIST_REJECTION_CODE  ,                     
CC_CROSS_CHARGE_CODE     ,                      
CC_IC_PROCESSED_CODE     ,                      
BILL_JOB_BILLING_TITLE   ,                    
ATTRIBUTE2          ,                         
ATTRIBUTE5         ,                          
CROSS_CHARGE_TYPE  ,                          
CONTROL_PU        ,                     
INVOICE_NUM      ,                
INVOICE_DATE    ,                          
PO_NUM   ,                                      
  null as non_labor_resource ,
CHARGED_PU         ,                   
CC_PRVDR_ORG_ID   ,                             
CC_RECVR_ORG_ID  ,                              
JOB_ID          ,                               
FUNC_CURR_CODE   ,                
FUNC_BURDENED_COST ,                            
FUNC_RAW_COST      ,                            
TASK_CUSTOMER_ID  ,                             
AE_LINE_NUM       ,                
SOURCE_TYPE       ,                     
AE_HEADER_ID     ,                 
USER_NAME         ,                             
X_ASSIGNED_PU_ID   ,                            
X_ORIG_TRANS_REFERENCE ,                        
X_GL_TRANSFER_DATE       ,

  FROM
